limitations.requires_compiler_feature: Executable transaction-wide aggregate invariant lowering over grouped cells
limitations.production_readiness_impact: The example is a benchmark model, not executable iCKB script equivalence evidence.

limitations.requires_compiler_feature: First-class CKB HeaderDep access with accumulated-rate binding
First-class OutPoint/MetaPoint relation and script lock/type role introspection
limitations.production_readiness_impact: Limit Order master/order role equivalence remains a model-level fixture check.

limitations.requires_compiler_feature: Checked wide multiply-add valuation and u128 ordering primitives
limitations.production_readiness_impact: Exact Limit Order price conservation is not yet emitted as executable CellScript logic.

limitations.requires_compiler_feature: Checked generic u128 multiply/divide expression support
limitations.production_readiness_impact: The 10 percent oversize discount formula is enforced by the Rust model verifier only.

limitations.requires_compiler_feature: Signed little-endian i32 relative indexes plus direct source-index role checks
limitations.production_readiness_impact: Owned-Owner relative-index semantics are approximated with unsigned fields in the example.

limitations.requires_compiler_feature: First-class Script values, lock/type role checks, and xUDT args construction
limitations.production_readiness_impact: Script role and xUDT args equivalence are represented by model fields, not executable script introspection.

limitations.requires_compiler_feature: Checked u128 ordering comparisons for capacity bounds
limitations.production_readiness_impact: Deposit capacity bounds are covered by model fixtures until checked u128 ordering is executable.
